# Harshil Raj

AI systems builder and cloud infrastructure expert based in India.

## Services
- AI-native automation systems (end-to-end workflow automation using Make, n8n, OpenAI)
- Cloud infrastructure and deployment (AWS, Google Cloud)
- AI strategy and consulting
- AI Receptionist (built on Retell AI, OpenAI, Make/n8n)

## Service Area
India and remote engagements globally.

## Contact
Email: harshilraj.growth@gmail.com
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/harshilraj
Website: https://harshilraj.vercel.app
Discovery call: https://harshilraj.vercel.app/#contact

## About
Harshil Raj is a CSE graduate with an AI/ML minor and founder of Livo, a technology services firm. He previously served as a project manager at an IT startup. He currently builds AI-native operational systems for SMB clients.
